items.title: Doctor of Philosophy in Caffeine Chemistry
items.institution: Department of Molecular Brewing, Bean University
highlights: Awarded the National Coffee Association Research Fellowship
Published in Journal of Caffeine Science

specs.val: Kinetic modeling of caffeine extraction: temperature, pressure, and grind size as control variables in pour-over thermodynamics.
Dr. Percolator (Chair), Prof. French Press, Dr. Moka Pot
Liquid chromatography, spectroscopic profiling, double-blind cupping trials.

items.title: Master of Science in Chocolate Aerodynamics
items.institution: School of Confectionery Engineering, Cocoa Institute
highlights: Best Thesis Award, International Cocoa Research Symposium
Developed a novel tempering method adopted by 3 artisan chocolatiers

specs.val: Tempering turbulence: the effect of airflow velocity on chocolate surface gloss and snap acoustics.
Textural Analysis Lab, Flavor Volatility Wind Tunnel
Rheometry, acoustic emission testing, differential scanning calorimetry.

items.title: Bachelor of Arts in Coffeehouse Philosophy
items.institution: Department of Existential Brewing, Cafe College
highlights: Founder of the campus Coffee and Contemplation Society

specs.val: First Class Honours. Specialization in the metaphysics of morning rituals and the semiotics of latte art.
A phenomenological inquiry into the relationship between ambient jazz and espresso extraction satisfaction.
Ethnographic observation, taste-drift analysis, hermeneutic cup interpretation.
